title: Predicting Student Dropout Using Machine Learning on Academic Records
abstract: This study develops machine learning models that predict university student dropout risk using academic performance and engagement data.

title: Multilingual Named Entity Recognition with a Single Neural Model
abstract: We train a single neural model for named entity recognition in 40 languages simultaneously, outperforming language-specific baselines.

title: Adversarial Example Detection Using Local Intrinsic Dimensionality
abstract: This paper proposes using local intrinsic dimensionality to detect adversarial examples in neural network inputs at inference time.

title: Topic Modeling for Research Trend Analysis Using Dynamic Embeddings
abstract: We develop dynamic embedding-based topic models that track the evolution of research topics in scientific literature over time.

title: Sim-to-Real Transfer for Robotic Grasping Using Domain Randomization
abstract: This work enables zero-shot sim-to-real transfer of robotic grasping policies by randomizing simulation parameters during training.

title: Automatic Music Transcription from Audio Using Convolutional Neural Networks
abstract: We design a CNN-based system that transcribes piano music from audio recordings into symbolic MIDI representations.

title: Heart Disease Prediction from Electronic Health Records Using Gradient Boosting
abstract: This study applies gradient boosting methods to electronic health records for early prediction of coronary heart disease risk.

title: Understanding Attention Patterns in Transformer Models for Code Generation
abstract: We analyze attention patterns in code-generating transformers to understand how models attend to different parts of natural language specifications.

title: Few-Shot Object Detection Using Prototype-Based Meta-Learning
abstract: This paper introduces a prototype-based meta-learning approach for detecting novel object categories with only a few training examples per class.

title: Generative Adversarial Networks for Data Augmentation in Medical Imaging
abstract: We use GANs to synthesize realistic medical images for training data augmentation, improving classifier performance on small datasets.

title: Question Generation from Text for Educational Assessment
abstract: This work develops a neural question generation system that creates educational assessment items from textbook content.

title: Cough Sound Analysis for COVID-19 Screening Using Deep Learning
abstract: We develop a deep learning model that screens for COVID-19 from cough sound recordings using spectral features and temporal patterns.

title: Optimizing Hyperparameters of Deep Networks Using Bayesian Optimization
abstract: This study applies Bayesian optimization to efficiently tune deep neural network hyperparameters, reducing search time by 80 percent.

title: Skeleton-Based Action Recognition Using Graph Convolutional Networks
abstract: We model human skeleton sequences as graphs and apply graph convolutional networks for action recognition in video surveillance.

title: Cross-Domain Recommendation Systems Using Adversarial Learning
abstract: This paper proposes adversarial learning methods to improve recommendation systems when user behavior differs across domains.
